scripts.dev:web:nocache: cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE=http://localhost:4000 NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_GOOGLE=true NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_TELEGRAM=false NEXT_CACHE_DISABLED=1 pnpm --filter @station-eden/web dev:nocache
scripts.dev:api: cross-env NODE_ENV=development API_PORT=4000 API_CORS_ORIGIN=http://localhost:3000,http://127.0.0.1:3000 COOKIE_SECURE=false ENABLE_GOOGLE_LOGIN=true GOOGLE_REDIRECT_URL=http://localhost:4000/auth/google/callback WEB_AFTER_LOGIN_URL=http://localhost:3000/profile CSRF_COOKIE_DOMAIN= AUTH_COOKIE_DOMAIN= pnpm --filter @station-eden/api start:dev
scripts.clean: pnpm -r run clean && rimraf node_modules && pnpm store prune
